subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who heareth and answereth, and beholdeth that which His servants do. Verily, He is the Truth, the All-Knowing, the Knower of things unseen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان من یسمع و یجیب و یری ما یعمل به العباد انه لهو الحق علام الغیوب قد
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @personal instructions, @chastisement and requital
